title: INIT-2.3.1 — GovernanceException Entity

sha_binding.verified_source_note: PR #865 squash-merged to main at a59a8c3a

r_level.reason: R-level check PASS — no R-level artifacts required (governance entity; no lifecycle-fsm, ingestor-provider, or outbox paths changed)

adversarial_tests: Valid exception → created with id + createdAt + status=active: PASS
Valid exception → auditEvent emitted with correct fields: PASS
Same approver and secondaryApprover → GovernanceExceptionValidationError: PASS
All fields valid → JSON round-trip replayable: PASS

constitutional_claims: GovernanceException entity requires all 9 fields — creation throws GovernanceExceptionValidationError on any missing field
Dual-approver enforcement: approver !== secondaryApprover, both non-empty
Justification minimum 10 chars — prevents trivial/placeholder justifications
Expiration must be future — no permanent exceptions possible
Exception creation emits AuditEvent with severity: governance-critical
Entity is replayable from stored lineage — pure data structure, no I/O
